courses.enrollware_name: BLS Provider (NHCSO)
courses.internal_title: AHA BLS Provider
courses.public_long_title: AHA BLS Provider
courses.description_short: Healthcare provider BLS with high-quality CPR, AED use, ventilations, choking response, and team communication.
courses.description_long: <!-- META: { "course_id": 209806, "meta_key": "AHA_BLS_INPERSON_INITIAL", "course_type": "BLS_INPERSON_INITIAL", "certifying_body": "AHA", "delivery": "in_person", "family": "BLS", "price": 85.00, "manual_required": true, "manual_options": ["OTHER_SOURCE","AHA_BOOKSTORE","AHA_EBK_BLS"], "cross_sell_addons": ["AHA_SKILLS_HS_FA"], "renewal_cycle_months": 24 } --> AHA BLS Provider for NHCSO Deputies – First Responder Focused This American Heart Association BLS Provider course is designed specifically for NHCSO Deputies, emphasizing first responder skills in high-stress environments. This training equips participants with the knowledge and hands-on practice necessary to perform life-saving interventions during critical emergencies. Course Highlights: Emphasis on first responder BLS skills relevant to law enforcement High-performance CPR techniques for adult, child, and infant patients Use of an AED and advanced airway considerations in the field Team-based resuscitation strategies for emergency response Scenario-based training tailored for law enforcement situations Special Note: This AHA program is sponsored by the department. While a CPR card is not required for duty, deputies may choose to receive an official AHA BLS Provider eCard for an $8.00 fee. If you would like a card upon completion, email Brian@910cpr.com or let your instructor know your interest. Class Format: In-person, hands-on instruction by experienced NHCSO Deputy Instructors. Cost: $0.00 (Department-sponsored). Optional AHA BLS eCard available for $8.00. Registration: Secure your spot today! Click the link below to register: Register Here
what_is_included: and scenario-based team communication aligned with current CPR/ECC guidance.

courses.enrollware_name: HSI BLS and Adult First Aid | Blended Learning
courses.internal_title: HSI BLS and Adult First Aid | Blended Learning
courses.public_long_title: HSI BLS and Adult First Aid | Blended Learning
courses.audience: Workplaces, medical or dental offices, ABA providers, and organizations that need both BLS and First Aid coverage in one HSI program.
courses.description_short: Blended learning for students who need both HSI BLS and Adult First Aid/CPR/AED. Complete the online portion first, then attend a short in-person skills session.
courses.description_long:
HSI BLS and Adult First Aid – Blended Learning

This blended learning course combines HSI Basic Life Support (BLS) and Adult First Aid/CPR/AED into one certification. Students complete the online coursework first, then attend a brief in-person skills session with an authorized HSI instructor.

Step 1: Complete the assigned online course.
Step 2: Attend a 30–60 minute in-person skills session.

This course is often a strong fit for workplaces, medical or dental offices, ABA providers, and other organizations that need both BLS and First Aid coverage in one program.

Certification: HSI certification issued upon successful completion and valid for two years.

Important: The online portion must be completed before your in-person skills session. The blended course link is non-refundable once issued.

HSI® is a registered trademark of Health & Safety Institute. 910CPR is an authorized provider offering blended learning and in-person HSI courses.
prerequisites: Complete the assigned online course before the in-person skills session.
what_is_included: Complete the HSI online coursework first
then attend a short hands-on skills session with an authorized HSI instructor.
courses.certification_type: HSI certification issued upon successful completion and valid for two years.

courses.internal_title: AHA Heartsaver CPR AED

courses.description_long: This class is for any individual who is looking for self-improvement, basic CPR for work that does not require a First Aid component (although, if desired, First Aid can be added by registering HERE), or families looking to ensure safety in the house and around the pool area. What is covered Adult, child and infant CPR Foreign-body airway obstruction Automated External Defibrillator (AED) Plan on spending Price Includes: Education and interactive skills instruction adult, child, and infant CPR with AED American Heart Association Course completion card for Heartsaver CPR for 2 years. ***THIS COURSE IS NOT FOR HEALTHCARE PROVIDERS PROVIDING PATIENT CARE --> Visit HERE for BLS options.
